title: The Killing of the King of Kham Jird and Renewed Peace with Khwarazm
description: The Killing of the King of Kham Jird and Renewed Peace with Khwarazm. Recorded under the year 92 AH (711–712 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 23.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
